name: Lynn Youngs
currentRole: Vice President of Hardware Engineering at Apple Inc
formerRole: Vice President, Camera Software Engineering at Apple Inc
connectionToCompany: Lynn Youngs led Camera Software Engineering at Apple, a function closely tied to Hardware Engineering under John Ternus. Her work on iPhone and iPad camera systems placed her in direct coordination with Ternus's hardware organization

name: Dan Riccio
currentRole: Special Projects Advisor at Apple Inc
formerRole: Senior Vice President, Hardware Engineering at Apple Inc
connectionToCompany: Dan Riccio was John Ternus's direct predecessor as SVP of Hardware Engineering at Apple. Ternus was elevated to the SVP role when Riccio transitioned to a special project role in 2021, making him the most proximate predecessor in the reporting chain
sourceNote: Apple press release January 2021 announcing leadership transition from Riccio to Ternus
verificationNote: No Gemini verification result. Current role is Special Projects Advisor, not a C-suite title, and he is a former SVP — kept as uncontested based on well-documented public Apple press release.
